titleStmt.title: SII 38.138: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 138. (A.R. No. 138 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On a pillar of the verandah, round the central shrine, Ādhipurīśvara temple.

summary.p: Begins with the meykīrtti of the king, Tirumaṉṉi-vaḷara.

Records the gift of ninety sheep by Gaṅgaikoṇḍachōḻaṉ alias Uttamachōḻamārāyan, a native of Tiruvārūr in Tiruvārūr-kūṟṟam in Kshtriyasikhāmaṇi-vaḷanaḍu for burning a perpetual lamp to the god of Tiruvoṟṟiyūr in Puḻal-nāḍu in Puḻalkōṭṭam (a subdivision) of Jayaṅkoṇḍachōḷa-maṇḍalam. It appears that he made this gift for the merit of Gaṇavati Iḍumbaṉ alias Taṉṉaimunivarpeṇḍirakaṇṭa Viśaiyaraiyaṇ, who killed himself for the sake of the donor. Three shepherds received the gift and agreed to burn the lamp.

This inscription further records that Nimbaladēviyār, queen of Indaḷadēvar of Talai-grāma in Virāḍa-dēśam made a gift of 90 sheep for burning a perpetual lamp. The shepherds of the Tiruvoṟṟiyūr temple received the sheep and undertook the responsibility of measuring oil at the temple treasury for the lamp.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī .— tirumaṉṉivaḷara Irunilamaṭantaiyum porccayappāvaiyu
ñ cirttanic celviyu n=taṉ perun=teviyarāki IṉpuṭaRead iṉpuṟaneṭu(r)tuyiruḻiyuṅ Iṭai
tuṟai nāṭu tuṭarvaṉavelippaṭar vaṉavāciyuñ cuḷḷic cūḻmatiḷ koḷḷippākkai
yum naṇṇaṟ karumuraṇ maṇṇaikkaṭakkamum porukaṭaliḻattaraicarta muṭiyum Āṅkava
ṉ ṟeviya roṅkeḻil muṭiyum muṉṉavar pakkal teṉnavaṉ vaitta cun=taramuṭiyum
In=tiṉāra(va)mum teṉṟicaiyiḻamaṇṭala muḻuvatum Eṟipaṭaikeraḷaṉ muṟaimai
yiṟ cūṭuṅkulataṉamākiya palar pukaḻmuṭiyuñ ceṅkatirmālaiyuñ caṅkatir velai
t tolperuṅkāval paḻan=tivum ceruviṟ ciṉavil Irupattoru kālaraicukaḷai
kaṭṭa paracurāmaṉ mevaruñcān=timat tivaraṇ karuti Iruttiya cempoṟ tiruttaku muṭiyum pa
yaṅkoṭu paḻi mika muyaṅkiyil mutukiṭṭoḷitta cayaciṅkaṉ Aḷapperum pukaḻoṭum piṭiyali
ṭṭa Iraṭṭapāṭi Eḻarai Ilakkamum navanitik kulapperumalaikaḷum vikkiramavirar cakkarako
ṭṭamum mutirpaṭavallai maturamaṇṭalamuṅ kāmiṭaivaḷa nāmaṇaik koṇamum ve
ñciṉa virar pañcappaḷḷiyum pācaṭaip paḻaṉa mācuṇi tecamum Ayarvil vaṇpurttiRead vaṇkirtti
yāti nakaravaiyiṟ can=tiraṉ ṟol kulattin=tirarataṉai viḷaiyamark kaḷattuk kiḷaiyoṭum
piṭittup peruntaṉattoṭu niṟaikula taṉakkuvaiyuṅ kiṭṭaruñ ceṟimiḷai Oṭṭaviṣayamum pūcurar
cera nalkkocalaināṭu n=tanmapālaṉai vemmuṉaiyaḻittu vaṇṭuṟai colait taṇṭapu
ttiyum Iraṇacūraṉai muraṇurat tākki tikkaṉai kirttit takkaṇalāṭamum kovin=tacan=taṉ māvi
ḻin toṭat taṅkātacāral vaṅkāḷatecamu n=toṭukaṭaṟ caṅka voṭṭal mahipālaṉai ve
ñcamar viḷākattañcuvittaruḷi Oṇṭiṟal yāṉaiyum peṇṭir paṇṭāramum nittilar
neṭuṅkaṭa(l)luttira lāṭamum veṟimalart tirttat teṟipunal kaṅkaiyum Alaikaṭaṟ naṭu
ve palakalañ celutti caṅkirāmavicaiyottuṅkapanmaṉākiya kaṭārattaraicaṉ vākai
yam porukaṭal kumpakkariyoṭumakap paṭutturimaiyil piṟakkiya peru netippiṟakkamum Ā
rttavan nakar (nakar) porttoḻil vācalil viccātiratoraṇamum porttoḷi punama
ṇiya putavamuṅ kanamaṇik katavum niṟaijiRead niṟai śrīvijaiyamu ntuṟai nirppaṉṉaiyum vaṉmalaiyu
raiyiṟ ceraṉmalaiyum Āḻkaṭalakaḻcūḻ māyiriṭiṅkamum kalaṅkā valviṉai Ila
ṅkācokamuṅ kāppuṟu niṟai punal māppap pāḷamum kāvalam puricai mevili paṅkamu
m viḷaippantūṟuṭai vaḷaippantūṟum nalattakRead kalaittakkor pukaḻkor pukaḻ talaittak kolamum titamar
valviṉai mātaviliṅkamum kalāmurik kaṭun=tiṟal Ilāmuritecamum teṉakkavaār poḻi
l māṉakkavāramum toṭukaṭaṟkāval kaṭumuraṭk kaṭāramum māpporu taṇṭāṟkoṉṭaRead koṇṭa
kopparakeśarivanmarāṉa Uṭaiyār śrīrājen=tiracoḻadevarkku yāṇṭu muppatāvatu
jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattuppuḻaṟkoṭṭattup puḻalṉāṭṭut tiruvo
ṟṟiyūruṭaiya mahādevarkku kṣatriyacikāmaṇi vaḷaṉāṭṭut tiruvārurk kūṟṟattut tiruvārurmārā
yaṉ kaṅkai koṇṭa coḻaṉāṉa Uttamacoḻa mārāyaṉukku tāyiṅ koṇṭu
kuttikkoṭu paṭṭa kaṇavati Iṭumpaṉāṉa taṉṉaimuṉivarpeṇṭira kaṇ
ṭa vicaiyaraiyaṉukkāka Uttamacoḻamārāyaṉ vaitta tirunan=tā viḷakku Oṉ
ṟukku vaitta Āṭu toṇṇūṟuṅ koṇṭu kaṭava maṉṟāṭikaḷ kiḷaiyaṉ mākāḷa
ṉ kaṭava viḷakkum Araiyum cālaṉ Attiyūraṉ kaṭava viḷakkuk kālum kaṭuvavali ceri kaṭava vi
ḷakkuk kālum Āka viḷakku Oṉṟum virāṭatecattil talaikkirāmam In=taḷatevar tevi
yār nimpala teviyār vaitta tirunan=tā viḷakku Oṉṟiṉukku vaitta Āṭu 9 10
Ivvāṭu toṇṇūṟuṅ koṇṭu tiruvoṟṟiyūr Uṭaiyār perum paṇ
ṭāratte nicatam ney Uḻakkāka Āṇṭu varaikkum ney toṇṇuṟṟu nāḻiyum
Aḷakkak kaṭavom tiruvoṟṟiyūr Uṭaiyār tiruviḷakkāṭu meykku maṉṟāṭikaḷ Ā
ccaṉ Icakkaṉum murtti Aiyyanaṭiyum tirumāl puṉṉaiyum nampakkali Araṅkaṉum
cūṟṟi tirumeṉiyum ciṅkaṉ cūṟṟiyum tāḻippaṭṭaṉum kaliyaṉ paṭṭaṉum Oṟṟikol
laṉum kiḷaiyaṉ paṇṭaṉum Uḷḷiṭṭa tiripuvaṉanātacceri maṉṟāṭikaḷom
Ippaṭi Uṇmaiyāka Ellārkkuñ camaintu koṇṭom Iru kālāvatu mukkā
lāvatum camaintu koṇṭom Ivvaṉaivom Ittaṉmam Ācan=tira tāramu
m paṉmāheśvararakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 38.138 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
